name: input-otp-demo
visual_summary: The Input OTP Demo component is a reusable input field for displaying OTP (One-Time Password) authentication codes. It typically appears on a screen, often in a registration or login flow, requiring users to input a unique code. Developers use this component when they need to integrate OTP authentication in their application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-otp-demo
Description: The Input OTP Demo component is a reusable input field for displaying OTP (One-Time Password) authentication codes. It typically appears on a screen, often in a registration or login flow, requiring users to input a unique code. Developers use this component when they need to integrate OTP authentication in their application.
Style: clean, minimal, mobile-friendly
Interactions: focusable, fillable, validatable
Tags: auth, otp, input, form, login

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
